zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Fitzgerald於1510年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達時，她的父親Gerald FitzGerald23歲，母親Elizabeth Zouche26歲。她於1526年與Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Fitzgerald于1510年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達时，她的父亲Gerald FitzGerald23岁，母亲Elizabeth Zouche26岁。她于1526年与Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Fitzgerald was born in 1510, in County Kildare, Ireland, her father, Gerald FitzGerald, was 23 and her mother, Elizabeth Zouche, was 26. She married Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston in 1526, in County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1591, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Fitzgerald est née en 1510, à County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzGerald, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Zouche, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston en 1526, à County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1591, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Fitzgerald 1510 in County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerald FitzGerald 23 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Zouche 26. Sie hat 1526 in County Kildare, Irland Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1591 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Fitzgerald è nata il nel 1510 nel County Kildare, Irlanda, sua padre, Gerald FitzGerald, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Zouche, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston nel 1526, nel County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1591, nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Fitzgeraldが1510年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzGeraldは23歳，母Elizabeth Zoucheは26歳であった。1526年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアでJenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで81歳で死去した。

ko.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르 앤드 래스아그가
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Fitzgerald(이)가 1510년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerald FitzGerald(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Zouche(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1526년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Fitzgerald nasceu em 1510, em County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzGerald, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Zouche, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston em 1526, em County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1591, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, com 81 anos.

ru.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: каилдар анд ратанган, коунти каилдар, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Fitzgerald родилась в 1510 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Gerald FitzGerald было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Zouche, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston в 1526 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1591 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 81 год.

Se casó con Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston en 1526, en County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1591, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 81 años.
